sensitivity: 89.2% (BW surface level); 88.2% (IOPA surface level); 81.0% conservative / 91.9% optimistic (BW image level); 83.1% conservative / 91.8% optimistic (IOPA image level)
specificity: 99.5% (BW surface level); 99.1% (IOPA surface level); 98.4% (BW image level); 98.4% (IOPA image level)
auc: 0.848 (BW AFROC, aided); 0.845 (IOPA AFROC, aided); 0.806 (BW AFROC, unaided); 0.807 (IOPA AFROC, unaided)
intended_use: Better Diagnostics Caries Assist is a radiological, automated, concurrent read, CADe software intended to identify and localize carious lesions on bitewings and periapical radiographs acquired from pa
intended_use_full: Better Diagnostics Caries Assist is a radiological, automated, concurrent read, CADe software intended to identify and localize carious lesions on bitewings and periapical radiographs acquired from patients aged 18 years or older. Better Diagnostics Caries assist is indicated for use by board licensed dentists. The device is not intended as a replacement for a complete dentist's review or their clinical judgment that takes into account other relevant information from the image, patient history or actual in vivo clinical assessment.
ground_truth: Consensus of two out of three experienced, licensed dentists with over 10 years of professional experience (standalone study); consensus of two among three licensed US dentists (MRMC clinical reader study)
other_metrics: MRMC sensitivity at surface level: 0.763 aided vs 0.707 unaided (BW); 0.746 aided vs 0.691 unaided (IOPA). MRMC specificity at surface level: 0.980 aided vs 0.974 unaided (BW); 0.983 aided vs 0.979 unaided (IOPA). Standalone study used Intersection over Union (IOU) 0.5 threshold.
